name: Citadel
description: Citadel towers stand in ranks, heights and inks shifting on redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; bottom: 0; width: 68%; height: @pick(35%, 60%, 85%, 100%); background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-radius: @pick(0px, 0px, 999px 999px 0 0); -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
